summary.what_built: This module adds a health check endpoint to verify the database connection status.
summary.problem: It solves the problem of monitoring the health of the database connection in a web application.
summary.risk: Medium risk due to lack of comprehensive error handling, which could lead to false health statuses.
summary.validation: The basic functionality of the health check endpoint was tested and passed.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the health check endpoint will be added to the application, allowing users to check the database status.
summary.uncertainty: It is uncertain how the application will behave under load or if the database connection fails unexpectedly.
